name: aiia
description: AIIA - Local AI chat and search agents

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @aiia/ollama-client && npm run build -w @aiia/scraper && npm run build -w @aiia/agent-engine && npm run build -w @aiia/agent-runner && npm run build -w @aiia/credential-runner
scripts.tauri:build: node scripts/bundle-runners.mjs && node scripts/bundle-update-helper.mjs && npm run tauri build -w @aiia/desktop
scripts.playwright:install: npm exec playwright install chromium --prefix packages/scraper
